[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up view shows a small yellow chick-like character with large green eyes and an orange beak.

The main subject is the chick character, filling most of the frame. It has smooth, round yellow textured-looking skin, two large, glossy green eyes with dark pupils, and an orange beak and lower face area. The chick’s head and upper body are visible, with its beak slightly angled toward the viewer.

The setting is unclear because the background is plain white. The lighting is soft and even, creating a clean, high-key look with minimal shadows.

No important visible text detected.

The image is a tight, centered portrait of a yellow chick-like figure’s face and upper body against a white background. Its prominent features are the large green eyes and orange beak.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain only an image (no readable UI text, labels, or words).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
